title: Fart Mod
description: Fart Mod is a simple and humorous mod that gives the player a speed boost whenever they hold the Shift key, simulating a "fart-powered" propulsion effect.
body: Fart Mod is a fun and lighthearted mod that gives players a boost of speed when they hold the Shift key, simulating fart-powered movement. It also includes a customizable interface—press G to open the GUI and tweak the settings to your liking.
